title: Samsung Galaxy S22+ — Reference Workstation
dock: USB-C hub with HDMI + 45W PD pass-through (5-in-1)
ssd: USB 3.x portable SSD, exFAT, mounted through the dock
performanceNotes: Desktop feels near-native at 1080p with compositing disabled
Sustained sessions stay smooth if background Android apps are trimmed
120Hz phone display coexists fine with the 60Hz external monitor
knownIssues: Samsung Auto Blocker silently blocks the Termux:X11 APK during installation
Brief display flicker when returning to Termux:X11 from the background
Alt+Tab is intercepted by DeX before reaching XFCE
workarounds: Temporarily disable Auto Blocker and allow the installer source, then re-enable — see the Termux:X11 guide
Wait 1-2 seconds or switch away and back to the app
Remap window switching in XFCE, e.g. to Super+Tab
